2026-05-27.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new helper function called folio_memcg_list_lru_alloc() that allocates list_lru heads for shrinkable folios under the memory cgroup (memcg) they are associated with. The function is designed to handle the complexities of accessing the memcg of a folio, which requires either RCU protection or pinning the cgroup. It aims to make the existence check lightweight under RCU and only pin the memcg when necessary for allocation. This patch is part of a larger series that prepares the THP shrinker to use list_lru, and it has been reviewed by several kernel developers.
